title: Phase I Study of DrugZ in Pediatric Asthma

sections.objectives: To determine the maximum tolerated dose of DrugZ in pediatric asthma patients
sections.inclusion_criteria: Children aged 6-12 with moderate to severe asthma confirmed by spirometry
sections.exclusion_criteria: Patients with known hypersensitivity to DrugZ or related compounds
sections.adverse_event_reporting: All adverse events must be reported within 12 hours given pediatric population

unsafe_dosages.violation: DrugZ daily dose of 2700mg massively exceeds WHO maximum of 750mg especially dangerous in pediatric population

contradictions.description: Objectives state finding maximum tolerated dose which is a Phase I goal but inclusion criteria restricts to children aged 6-12 making maximum dose escalation ethically contradictory in pediatric patients
Dosage is set for adult weight ranges but inclusion criteria only includes children aged 6-12 whose body weight requires significantly lower dosing
